ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the component (e.g., IC, resistor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Current revision number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was released */,
  "obsolete_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the component is obsolete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's website */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Measurement unit of the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., nanoseconds, milliseconds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., ns, ms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being specified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specification */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the specification was added */,
  "specification_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., datasheet, manual) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in this version */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_access" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., viewed, modified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_access_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details regarding the action taken */,
  "related_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_related_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being requested for change */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being requested for change */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being linked */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_links_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tags_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
